case_title: IMMING, THERESA et al vs. BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2001, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON NOV-19-2001 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING
ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMMING, THERESA IMMING, DONALD FRANCO, BIANCA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM FRANCO, MONICA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM IMMING, THERESA AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINORS(2) IMMING, THERESA AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MONICA FRANCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION THAT THE CLAIM OF ALL PLAINTIFFS IS DENIED. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSS OF SUIT.

PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY, TWO ORDER ONE FOR EACH MINOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCO, BIANCA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM FRANCO, MONICA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM IMMING, THERESA AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINORS(2)
ARBITRATOR SANFORD, RICHARD MERRITT (039368) UNABLE TO SERVE SCHEDULE CONFLICT
